overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character with long blonde hair through a moody coastal landscape. The character traverses a narrow rocky canyon, emerges onto a sandy beach with a wooden fortification structure, and continues along a reed-lined shoreline under heavy overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between steep cliff faces

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky canyon with steep stone walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: tall steep rock face forming the left wall of the canyon passage
tall steep rock face forming the right wall of the canyon passage
uneven rocky gravel surface covering the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed rocky canyon with steep stone walls on both sides. The ground is covered in gravel and small rocks, and the sky is only partially visible overhead through the canyon opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with wooden fortification structure

events.description: exits the narrow rocky canyon onto an open beach shoreline with visible water

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach passing a wooden fortification built on stilts against the cliff

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform built on stilts against the rock face with wooden beams and supports
calm sea or lake visible beyond the sandy shoreline
hazy mountain peaks visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character emerges from the canyon onto a wide sandy beach. A wooden fortification structure on stilts appears on the right, while the sea becomes visible on the left. Distant mountains loom across the water under the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path lined with tall dry reeds and grasses

events.description: tall clumps of dry reeds and grasses appear along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal path walking through patches of tall dry reeds swaying in the wind

entered.detail: clumps of tall golden-brown grass and reeds lining the right side of the coastal path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the shoreline path, now flanked by tall dry reeds and grasses on the right. The wooden structure falls behind, and the water remains visible to the left while distant mountains and rocky outcrops define the horizon ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into an expansive, overcast coastal landscape. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage enclosed by steep stone walls and a gravel-strewn floor. As the character moves forward, the canyon opens up to reveal a wide sandy beach, where a wooden fortification on stilts appears to the right and the sea unfolds to the left. The scene then shifts as the character continues along the shoreline, leaving the structure behind while the path becomes flanked by tall dry reeds and grasses. Finally, the camera tracks toward the horizon, where distant mountains and rocky outcrops loom under a heavy gray sky.
